This is a three-day contact 72 hours after they purchase your product or you have installed the product you've closed finished they're a customer if possible make this a personal visit if not make a call no matter what within 72 hours you should have made two contacts at minimum. The reason I'm calling John is and pick one do you have any problems that I can resolve for you do you have any questions that I can answer have you gotten any compliments or any feedback from others oh by the way what kind of feedback are you getting look in this call be clear always be clear the reason I'm calling 72 hours later do you have any problems do you have any questions is there anything you need have you gotten any compliments did you get any feedback oh by the way who do you know there you go who do you know that might be interested in what we do here there's your call 72 hours later make it use the reason be clear be concise and keep it tight
